fields._orbSlot: The slot to store the material orb when an orb is placed into the tool or picked from an object.
fields.ReplacementMode: How to replace materials using the tool.
fields.AreaRadius: The radius to use when ``ReplacementMode`` is set to Area.
fields._areaIndicator: The slot that is the root of the area indicator visual.
fields._areaIndicatorActive: The area indicator's active field, used to disable the visual when ``ReplacementMode`` is not set to Area.
fields._knobControlActive: The active field of the knob control visual/control.

methods.SnapFilter: A function that can be used in a snapper to filter what objects can snap to a snapper (filters to material orbs only).
methods.EditMaterial: Called when the edit material button is touched.
methods.CreateCopy: Called when the create copy button is touched.
methods.CreateMaterial: Called when the create material button is touched.
methods.ConvertAllMaterials: Called when the convert all button is touched.
methods.ConvertMaterial: Called when the convert button is touched.
methods.RunConversion: Called when the convert process is started.
methods.CanKnobControlInteract: Can be used to check if a grabber is allowed to interact with a grabber. Can be used to filter the same hand from grabbing an item on this material tip! (possibly only instance of this behavior being possible)
